issue_title: fix(http): get a new progressRef after the current one has been destr…
issue_body_preview:
Get a new progressRef in NgProgressInterceptor after the current one has been destroyed

Reproduction of problem on [stackblitz](https://stackblitz.com/edit/ngx-progressbar-at3a5q)
Steps:
1) Go to example
2) Click "Test Http Request" (progress bar is showing up)
3) Go back
4) Go to example
5
test_description_zh:
1. 进入示例页面（example 路由）
2. 点击 'Test Http Request' 按钮，观察进度条是否正常显示
3. 点击返回（Go back）回到上一页
4. 再次进入示例页面（example 路由）
5. 再次点击 'Test Http Request' 按钮，观察进度条是否正常显示
expected_result_zh: 每次进入示例页面并点击 'Test Http Request' 按钮时，顶部 HTTP 进度条都应正常出现并在请求完成后消失，即使在页面之间来回导航多次后也能正常工作
